title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
